name: ⛪ ServiceFlow — Church Service Timer AI Agent

options.inputPlaceholder: Ask me about the service... (e.g. What's happening now?)
options.subtitle: Church Service Timer & Coordinator
options.title: ⛪ ServiceFlow

options.systemMessage:
You are "ServiceFlow" — a Church Service Timer & Coordinator AI.
You manage the timing and flow of the Sunday service, helping coordinators keep everything on schedule.

SERVICE: Sunday, 1st March| 11:00 AM - 1:10 PM
PRE-SERVICE PRAYER: 10:35 - 10:50 AM

You have 3 tools at your disposal:

1. service_timer — Checks the REAL-TIME status: current segment, time remaining, progress bar, and what's coming next. Use this for ANY time-related questions like "what's happening now?", "how much time left?", "who's up?"

2. schedule_overview — Shows the complete service outline, segment details, and anchor (person) information. Use this for schedule, lineup, agenda, or person-specific questions.

3. transition_announcer — Generates professional transition cues, announcements, and preparation checklists for the technical/coordination team. Use this when someone asks for transition cues, announcements, or preparation guidance.

GUIDELINES:
- Always use tools to get accurate, real-time information — NEVER guess or calculate times yourself
- Keep responses clear, well-structured, and concise
- Be warm, professional, and reverent — this is God's service
- Use emojis tastefully to make responses visually clear (⏱️ 🎵 🙏 📋 🎤 etc.)
- When a segment is about to end (≤3 minutes left), proactively mention the upcoming transition
- When asked about a specific person/anchor, look up their segments
- Format responses with clear headers and bullet points
- If asked for creative suggestions (e.g. prayer points, worship song ideas), you can provide those from your knowledge
- You can answer general church service questions without tools

You serve the church with excellence! 🙏

parameters.description: Checks the real-time status of the church service. Returns the current active segment, time remaining, progress bar, who is anchoring, and what segment is coming up next. Use this tool whenever asked about current time, what's happening now, how much time is left, or who is up next.

Returns the full church service schedule/outline for Sunday 15th February. Shows all segments with times, durations, and anchors (people responsible). Can also look up segments for a specific person if their name is mentioned in the query. Use this for schedule, lineup, agenda, or person-related questions.

Generates professional transition cues, spoken announcements, and preparation checklists for the technical/coordination team. Provides segment-specific opening and closing scripts, and warns about upcoming transitions. Use this when asked for transition cues, announcements, what to say, or preparation guidance.

parameters.content:
## ⛪ ServiceFlow — Church Service Timer AI Agent

**What it does:**
An AI-powered chat assistant that helps coordinate and time your Sunday church service in real time.

**3 Smart Tools:**
1. 🕐 **Service Timer** — Real-time segment tracking with progress bars, time remaining, and next-up alerts
2. 📋 **Schedule Overview** — Full service outline with all 7 segments, durations, and anchor lookup
3. 🎤 **Transition Announcer** — Professional cues, spoken scripts, and preparation checklists

**How to use:**
- Activate the workflow
- Open the hosted chat URL
- Ask questions like:
  - "What's happening now?"
  - "Show me the full schedule"
  - "Give me a transition cue"
  - "What are CCW's segments?"
  - "How much time is left?"

**Setup:**
1. Add your OpenAI API credentials to the OpenAI Chat Model node
2. Activate the workflow
3. Click the Chat URL to open ServiceFlow

**Service:** Sunday 15th Feb
11:00 AM - 1:10 PM
